data.title: New report on EV integration trends reveals installation of innovative technologies like three-motor four-wheel drive, drive-brake integration & corner modules.
data.description: Dublin - There is a new report available titled "New Energy Vehicle Cross-Domain (Electric Drive System and Powertrain Domain) Integration Trend Report" for 2025-2026. The report highlights key insights on advancements in electric drive and powertrain domain research. Technologies like three-motor four-wheel drive, drive-brake integration, and corner modules are gaining traction in vehicles. The integration of electric drive is progressing towards powertrain domain and cross-domain integration. This signifies a shift towards innovation and efficiency in the automotive sector.

data.title: Krispy Kreme brings back fan-favorite Chocomania Collection with 4 new chocolate-glazed doughnuts. Available Jan 27 - Feb 1.
data.description: Charlotte, N.C.-- Krispy Kreme® is bringing back Chocomania with a twist, offering four new chocolate-glazed doughnuts featuring HERSHEY’S chocolate. The limited-time Chocomania Collection will be available at select Krispy Kreme locations nationwide for just six days, running from Tuesday, Jan. 27 to Sunday, Feb. 1. The collection includes: a new Chocolate Cheesecake Doughnut, HERSHEY’S Chocolate Original Glazed® doughnut with cheesecake swirl and HERSHEY’S mini chocolate chips.

data.title: Trade risks rise as Canada-China deal fears reignite, impacting earnings for mega caps. US tariff concerns loom, rekindling sensitivity in markets, even incremental headlines are enough to reprice risk. Bitcoin declines to 86k as Yen strengthens.
data.description: Risk in trade increases as earnings for mega-cap companies approach, with concerns over potential U.S. tariffs growing due to uncertainties around a Canada-China deal. Although not confirmed policy, markets react strongly to any news reopening the trade front, especially as growth expectations stabilize. Even small updates can impact risk in globally exposed sectors, necessitating quick adjustments in equities, currencies, and interest rates. This headline risk affects market sentiment, dampening short-term enthusiasm. Bitcoin has fallen to around 86k from a recent high of 96k, aligning with a broader downtrend, coinciding with the strengthening of the Yen. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Year-end report for financial year 2025 by SciBase postponed to March 13, 2026, from original date.
data.description: The Board of Directors of SciBase Holding AB (publ) has decided to delay the release of the year-end report for the financial year 2025 until March 13, 2026, due to the need to synchronize trading schedules. This decision was made in Stockholm on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Acumatica showcases AI's impact on businesses at Summit 2026 in Seattle with 3,000 attendees.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica, a prominent cloud-based ERP provider for small and mid-sized businesses, launched Acumatica Summit 2026 with a keynote speech highlighting the impact of AI, human creativity, and the tangible successes clients are experiencing. This marked the inaugural occurrence of the company's primary event in Seattle, drawing over 3,000 Community members to the convention center. The keynote underscored Acumatica's enduring commitment to innovation.

data.title: TÜV Rheinland verifies Govee Smart Lighting Products at CES 2026 for exceptional durability and reliability through testing under simulated real-world conditions.
data.description: In Las Vegas, TÜV Rheinland has granted Verification Statements to numerous Govee smart lighting products after subjecting them to testing in conditions resembling real-world scenarios.

data.title: SES acknowledges Fitch's rating action, maintaining investment grade rating with stable outlook. Focus on deleveraging plan.
data.description: Luxembourg-based SES S.A., a prominent space solutions company, has acknowledged the recent credit rating action by Fitch. This follows the disclosure of SES' Q3 2025 results and an update on the integration with Intelsat. Despite this, SES maintains an investment grade rating from Fitch with a stable outlook. The management emphasizes the company's commitment to executing its strategic plan, aiming to enhance its important credit metrics progressively. SES is steadfast in its approach to improving its financial position.

data.title: Capital City Bank Group (NASDAQ: CCBG) to release quarterly earnings on 2026-01-27. Analysts predict EPS of $0.89. Market awaits strong guidance.
data.description: Capital City Bank Group (NASDAQ: CCBG) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on January 27, 2026. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.89 for the company. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, with hopes of surpassing estimates and receiving positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It's crucial for new investors to recognize that while earnings performance is significant, market reactions are frequently influenced by guidance. In the past, the company has beaten its EPS expectations. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.description: National Bank Holdings (NYSE: NBHC) will release its quarterly earnings report on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. data.title: PR Newswire introduces enhanced Brand Voice features for precise content control in the Amplify platform.
data.description: PR Newswire has announced the launch of improved Brand Voice features on its PR Newswire Amplify™ platform. These enhancements offer customers heightened control over content creation, enabling a more precise application of their brand voice. This update aims to provide users with a more customizable experience and improve brand representation on the platform.
